# stripe Provider

Manage Stripe resources with Terraform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Stripe API key. Can also be set via the STRIPE_API_KEY environment variable.
- `stripe_account` (String) Connected account context for Connect-scoped requests. Can also be set via the STRIPE_ACCOUNT environment variable.
